lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਐਸਾ ਆਗੂ ਜਾਪੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak aisaa aagoo jaapai |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, such are the leaders of men. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰੀ ਨੋ ਸਮਝਾਵਣਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: avaree no samajhaavan jaae |
lines.english: And yet, they go out to teach others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਠਾ ਆਪਿ ਮੁਹਾਏ ਸਾਥੈ ॥
lines.translit: mutthaa aap muhaae saathai |
lines.english: They are deceived, and they deceive their companions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਦੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਸੋ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਅਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis dai andar sach hai so sachaa naam mukh sach alaae |
lines.english: Those, within whom the Truth dwells, obtain the True Name; they speak only the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਆਪਿ ਚਲਦਾ ਹੋਰਨਾ ਨੋ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ohu har maarag aap chaladaa horanaa no har maarag paae |
lines.english: They walk on the Lord's Path, and inspire others to walk on the Lord's Path as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਰਥੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਜੋ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: teerath pooraa satiguroo jo anadin har har naam dhiaae |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Perfect Pool of Holy Water. Night and day, He meditates on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਅਗੈ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਹੋਇ ਤਾ ਮਲੁ ਲਹੈ ਛਪੜਿ ਨਾਤੈ ਸਗਵੀ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: je agai teerath hoe taa mal lahai chhaparr naatai sagavee mal laae |
lines.english: Bathing in a pool of holy water, they are washed clean of filth. But, by bathing in a stagnant pond, they are contaminated with even more filth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਆਪਿ ਛੁਟਾ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਸਿਉ ਦੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਭ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਛਡਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ohu aap chhuttaa kuttanb siau de har har naam sabh srisatt chhaddaae |
lines.english: He is saved, along with his family; bestowing the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, He saves the whole world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਕੰਦ ਮੂਲੁ ਚੁਣਿ ਖਾਹਿ ਵਣ ਖੰਡਿ ਵਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik kand mool chun khaeh van khandd vaasaa |
lines.english: Some pick and eat fruits and roots, and live in the wilderness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜੋ ਆਪਿ ਜਪੈ ਅਵਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak tis balihaaranai jo aap japai avaraa naam japaae |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is a sacrifice to one who himself chants the Naam, and inspires others to chant it as well. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਭਗਵਾ ਵੇਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਜੋਗੀ ਸੰਨਿਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik bhagavaa ves kar fireh jogee saniaasaa |
lines.english: Some wander around wearing saffron robes, as Yogis and Sanyaasees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਛਾਦਨ ਭੋਜਨ ਕੀ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: andar trisanaa bahut chhaadan bhojan kee aasaa |
lines.english: But there is still so much desire within them-they still yearn for clothes and food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਸਿਰਹੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਬਿਧਿ ਮਨਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jamakaal sirahu na utarai tribidh manasaa |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death hangs over their heads, and they cannot escape the three-phased desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਨ ਗਿਰਹੀ ਨ ਉਦਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: birathaa janam gavaae na girahee na udaasaa |
lines.english: They waste their lives uselessly; they are neither householders nor renunciates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਚੁ ਮਨਿ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਉਦਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa sabad sach man ghar hee maeh udaasaa |
lines.english: The True Word of the Shabad abides in their true minds; within the home of their own inner beings, they remain detached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੇ ਆਸਾ ਤੇ ਨਿਰਾਸਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur sevan aapanaa se aasaa te niraasaa |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who serve their True Guru, rise from desire to desirelessness. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨੇੜੈ ਜਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee kaal na aavai nerrai jaa hovai daasan daasaa |
lines.english: Death does not even approach those who follow the Guru's Teachings, and become the slaves of the Lord's slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਰਤੁ ਲਗੈ ਕਪੜੈ ਜਾਮਾ ਹੋਇ ਪਲੀਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: je rat lagai kaparrai jaamaa hoe paleet |
lines.english: If one's clothes are stained with blood, the garment becomes polluted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਰਤੁ ਪੀਵਹਿ ਮਾਣਸਾ ਤਿਨ ਕਿਉ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਚੀਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo rat peeveh maanasaa tin kiau niramal cheet |
lines.english: Those who suck the blood of human beings-how can their consciousness be pure?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਉ ਖੁਦਾਇ ਕਾ ਦਿਲਿ ਹਛੈ ਮੁਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak naau khudaae kaa dil hachhai mukh lehu |
lines.english: O Nanak, chant the Name of God, with heart-felt devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰਿ ਦਿਵਾਜੇ ਦੁਨੀ ਕੇ ਝੂਠੇ ਅਮਲ ਕਰੇਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: avar divaaje dunee ke jhootthe amal karehu |1|
lines.english: Everything else is just a pompous worldly show, and the practice of false deeds. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਹਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਆਖਾ ਕਿਹੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa hau naahee taa kiaa aakhaa kihu naahee kiaa hovaa |
lines.english: Since I am no one, what can I say? Since I am nothing, what can I be?

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਕਰਣਾ ਕਹਿਆ ਕਥਨਾ ਭਰਿਆ ਭਰਿ ਭਰਿ ਧੋਵਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa karanaa kahiaa kathanaa bhariaa bhar bhar dhovaan |
lines.english: As He created me, so I act. As He causes me to speak, so I speak. I am full and overflowing with sins-if only I could wash them away!

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਨ ਬੁਝਾ ਲੋਕ ਬੁਝਾਈ ਐਸਾ ਆਗੂ ਹੋਵਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: aap na bujhaa lok bujhaaee aisaa aagoo hovaan |
lines.english: I do not understand myself, and yet I try to teach others. Such is the guide I am!

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਧਾ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਦਸੇ ਰਾਹੈ ਸਭਸੁ ਮੁਹਾਏ ਸਾਥੈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak andhaa hoe kai dase raahai sabhas muhaae saathai |
lines.english: O Nanak, the one who is blind shows others the way, and misleads all his companions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਗਇਆ ਮੁਹੇ ਮੁਹਿ ਪਾਹਿ ਸੁ ਐਸਾ ਆਗੂ ਜਾਪੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: agai geaa muhe muhi paeh su aisaa aagoo jaapai |2|
lines.english: But, going to the world hereafter, he shall be beaten and kicked in the face; then, it will be obvious, what sort of guide he was! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਹਾ ਰੁਤੀ ਸਭ ਤੂੰ ਘੜੀ ਮੂਰਤ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: maahaa rutee sabh toon gharree moorat veechaaraa |
lines.english: Through all the months and the seasons, the minutes and the hours, I dwell upon You, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਗਣਤੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਸਚੇ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: toon ganatai kinai na paaeo sache alakh apaaraa |
lines.english: No one has attained You by clever calculations, O True, Unseen and Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿਆ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਿਸੁ ਲਬੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: parriaa moorakh aakheeai jis lab lobh ahankaaraa |
lines.english: That scholar who is full of greed, arrogant pride and egotism, is known to be a fool.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਪੜੀਐ ਨਾਉ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: naau parreeai naau bujheeai guramatee veechaaraa |
lines.english: So read the Name, and realize the Name, and contemplate the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਖਟਿਆ ਭਗਤੀ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee naam dhan khattiaa bhagatee bhare bhanddaaraa |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, I have earned the wealth of the Naam; I possess the storehouses, overflowing with devotion to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਚਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: niramal naam maniaa dar sachai sachiaaraa |
lines.english: Believing in the Immaculate Naam, one is hailed as true, in the True Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹੁ ਇਕੁ ਤੂੰ ਹੋਰੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਵਣਜਾਰਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahu ik toon hor jagat vanajaaraa |6|
lines.english: You alone are the True Banker, O Lord; the rest of the world is just Your petty trader. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਦਾ ਜੀਉ ਪਰਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis daa jeeo paraan hai antar jot apaaraa |
lines.english: The Divine Light of the Infinite Lord, who owns the soul and the breath of life, is deep within the inner being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਮ ਸੁੰਨਤਿ ਸੀਲੁ ਰੋਜਾ ਹੋਹੁ ਮੁਸਲਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: saram sunat seel rojaa hohu musalamaan |
lines.english: Make modesty your circumcision, and good conduct your fast. In this way, you shall be a true Muslim.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਹਰ ਮਸੀਤਿ ਸਿਦਕੁ ਮੁਸਲਾ ਹਕੁ ਹਲਾਲੁ ਕੁਰਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: mihar maseet sidak musalaa hak halaal kuraan |
lines.english: Let mercy be your mosque, faith your prayer-mat, and honest living your Koran.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣੀ ਕਾਬਾ ਸਚੁ ਪੀਰੁ ਕਲਮਾ ਕਰਮ ਨਿਵਾਜ ॥
lines.translit: karanee kaabaa sach peer kalamaa karam nivaaj |
lines.english: Let good conduct be your Kaabaa, Truth your spiritual guide, and the karma of good deeds your prayer and chant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਸਬੀ ਸਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਸੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਖੈ ਲਾਜ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tasabee saa tis bhaavasee naanak rakhai laaj |1|
lines.english: Let your rosary be that which is pleasing to His Will. O Nanak, God shall preserve your honor. ||1||
